final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (A Chinese Odyssey) reimagined in 90s Hong Kong cinema style, featuring the iconic city wall embrace, in the grainy romance of golden-era Cantonese film.

Style/medium: 90s Hong Kong cinema poster with the tactile grain and saturated warmth of Cantonese golden-era film stock, evoking the romantic melancholy of Wong Kar-wai's contemporaries
Composition: the lovers at center frame on ancient city wall, elevated and isolated; the antagonist and monk as distant silhouettes below, creating visual hierarchy through scale and depth
Subject: 至尊宝 (Zhi Zunbao / Monkey King) and 紫霞 (Zi Xia) in their famous embrace on the city wall, distant 牛魔王 (Bull Demon King) and 唐僧 (Tang Monk) standing below as witness figures
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese city wall at dusk, the vast sky swallowing the horizon, distant desert or wasteland below the wall
Lighting/mood: the honeyed melancholy of 90s Hong Kong romance cinema, golden hour bleeding into purple dusk, a held breath between comedy and tragedy
Color palette: warm amber and honey tones against deepening purple-blue sky, the saturated yet slightly faded palette of aged film stock
Materials/textures: 35mm film grain, slight color separation, the soft texture of projected celluloid
Text (verbatim): 大话西游
Constraints: 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic, all four characters present and positioned as described, film grain visible
Avoid: modern digital crispness, contemporary Chinese blockbuster aesthetic, overly clean or glossy finish
